title: Intensely Savory British Lamb Cottage Pie
description: A winey, chewy, midnight-craving British dish featuring starch, infuse-oil, and Mediterranean-friendly flavors in a cottage pie form, perfect for satisfying late-night cravings.

ingredients.name: ground lamb
ingredients.notes: preferably with some fat for flavor

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the ground lamb to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the red wine, tomato paste, and rosemary to the skillet, stirring to combine, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the lamb mixture is simmering, prepare the mashed potatoes according to your preference.
Transfer the lamb mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the mashed potatoes.
Bake the cottage pie in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
